name: API Gateway
description: FastAPI server and routing layer — entry point for all client requests

name: Scraping Engine
description: Multi-layer extraction: HTTP → Playwright → JSON-LD → Vision. Includes platform-specific scrapers.

name: Analysis Pipeline

description: Background scheduler for recurring scrapes and Google Sheets export service

name: Package Structure
description: Package init markers for module and platform subpackages
